---
name: Enhancement / Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: marcogiampaolo2017-afk
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing what you want -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Implementation
<!-- How would you implement it? Which file(s) would change? -->

## Risks
<!-- Any downsides, edge cases, or things that could go wrong? -->

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests added / updated
